description_long: This is a classic baseball cap featuring a vibrant orange and white color scheme. The front panel is white and displays a large, stylized green 'C' logo, while the rest of the cap is a bright orange. The cap has a structured, rounded crown with visible stitching and a firm, slightly curved brim. The back of the cap includes an open section, likely for size adjustment, and a matching orange strap. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, giving it a slightly glossy, smooth finish.
description: A vibrant orange and white baseball cap with a green 'C' logo on the front and a structured, rounded crown. The cap features a slightly curved brim and an open adjustable back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange crown and brim, with the white front panel and part of the green logo visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open adjustable section and orange strap at the back of the cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the orange crown and brim, with the white front panel and more of the green logo visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the white panel with the green 'C' logo and the full orange brim.
